itemReviewed.name: Bal Bharati Public School - Brij Vihar,Surya Nagar

address.streetAddress: Post Office, Brij Vihar Rd, Block A, Chander Nagar, Surya Nagar, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201011, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
One of my cousins is an existing student of Bal Bharati Public School, Brij Vihar and I have witnessed his transformational journey quite closely. It has been an impressive one. He is a part of the musical band of the school and not only the school trains the students on various musical instruments of their choice thoroughly, but encourages them to participate in a host of events to get their beautiful skills improved further and duly acknowledged.

It is evident at every front, be it scholastic or co-scholastic. The online classes were carried out by the mentors during pandemic situation in a sincere and devoted manner. And there exists no complacency during regular classes too. The school has improved its infrastructure considerably over years with respect to classrooms, integration of technology, well-equipped laboratories, well-manicured and dedicated play fields for a host of outdoor sports.

There are two aspects that the decision-makers shall and must take into account. Many teachers are simply splendid, but many do require more hands-on training, experiences and exposure. The school shall invite and involve professionals from various walks of life who are mentors at heart as it will prove to be highly beneficial to the students and teachers alike.

Secondly, the parking system shall be streamlined as it causes inconvenience to the residents and passersby. It is manageable once the Administration Department of the school chalks out an effective plan. Rest is great. I extend my best wishes to all the stakeholders of the school.

Happy Learning & Growing!

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wanted to give 0.1 star to this no AC school but there in no option for this.
Pathetic experienceand the furniture is damaged.They take money for maintainance and also for swimming. They also do patiality in contest. Students are not able to concentrate in this surroundings

itemReviewed.name: Bal Bharati Public School - Brij Vihar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: This is a good school for extracurricular and academics but I have some issues with this school even tho my daughter has been studying in it since mont-1 and I have noticed that the receptionist/workers don’t pay much attention to people living far from the school , since we shifted from Brij Vihar to Indirapuram  we have continuously asked them to see if they can arrange a seat in the bus for my daughter but they make foolish excuses and it triggers me inside and also the fact that they don’t have a cafeteria that’s not good as I am a working woman and I can’t make always breakfast for my daughter due to my busy schedule so these were the problems hope the school pays a good attention to this .

itemListElement.reviewBody: Best school I hv ever seen. Very good facilities and they are make sure of students health
